## Ingredients.IngredientsLibrary.loadFromFileTreeSource() method

Loads ingredients from a file tree source and adds them to this library.

**Signature:**

```typescript
loadFromFileTreeSource(source: IIngredientFileTreeSource): Result<number>;
```
